'''jaloyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadsorption|coadsorption]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadsorption|coadsorption]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jaloyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæleyeth|jæleyeth]] || [[word:jæleyej|jæleyej]] || [[word:jæleyesh|jæleyesh]] || [[word:jæleye|jæleye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jaloloyoth|jaloloyoth]] || [[word:jaloloyoj|jaloloyoj]] || [[word:jaloloyosh|jaloloyosh]] || [[word:jaloloyo|jaloloyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jaloyoth|jaloyoth]] || [[word:jaloyoj|jaloyoj]] || [[word:jaloyosh|jaloyosh]] || [[word:jaloyo|jaloyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jalofyoth|jalofyoth]] || [[word:jalofyoj|jalofyoj]] || [[word:jalofyosh|jalofyosh]] || [[word:jalofyof|jalofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jaloyotho|jaloyotho]] || [[word:jaloyojo|jaloyojo]] || [[word:jaloyosho|jaloyosho]] || [[word:jaloyoko|jaloyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jaloyoth|jaloyoth]] || [[word:jaloyoj|jaloyoj]] || [[word:jaloyosh|jaloyosh]] || [[word:jaloyo|jaloyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jaloyothol|jaloyothol]] || [[word:jaloyojol|jaloyojol]] || [[word:jaloyoshol|jaloyoshol]] || [[word:jaloyokol|jaloyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jaloyothotho|jaloyothotho]] || [[word:jaloyojojo|jaloyojojo]] || [[word:jaloyoshosho|jaloyoshosho]] || [[word:jaloyoko|jaloyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jaloyothon|jaloyothon]] || [[word:jaloyojon|jaloyojon]] || [[word:jaloyoshon|jaloyoshon]] || [[word:jaloyokon|jaloyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jaloyothoro|jaloyothoro]] || [[word:jaloyojoro|jaloyojoro]] || [[word:jaloyoshoro|jaloyoshoro]] || [[word:jaloyokoro|jaloyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
